bird.name: 臺灣紫嘯鶇
bird.summary: 臺灣紫嘯鶇（學名：Myophonus insularis），又稱琉璃鳥、烏磯（臺羅：Oo-ki）、紫嘯鶇，是雀形目鶲科嘯鶇屬下的一種鳥類。牠們棲息於中低海拔的森林中及溪澗旁，是僅分佈於臺灣的特有種之一。為肉食性，主要以昆蟲等無脊椎動物為食。 全身以藍黑色系為主，胸腹上有藍色的鱗…

relations.subject: 臺灣紫嘯鶇
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is found at elevations of up to
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 臺灣紫嘯鶇
relations.evidence: Its population is estimated at 10,000 to 100,000 breeding pairs and is suspected to be decreasing due to habitat destruction. It was listed as other conservation-deserving wildlife in the schedule of protected species of the Taiwan Wildlife Conservation Act, but was removed from the list in 2008
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
